name: Concordia Bank Of Concordia, Missouri
description_short: Community bank in Missouri offering checking accounts, savings products, mobile banking, and refinancing services with emphasis on personalized customer service.
description_long: Concordia Bank is a traditional community bank headquartered in Concordia, Missouri, with additional branches in Odessa and Laurie. The bank operates multiple physical locations with drive-through facilities and maintains standard banking hours Monday through Friday, with limited Saturday service at select branches. Founded on the principle of combining modern banking technology with old-fashioned customer service, Concordia Bank serves the central Missouri region through in-person and digital banking channels. The bank's primary offerings include Kasasa® checking accounts (including a cash-back checking product earning 2% cash back up to $6 monthly), mobile deposit functionality, ATM fee refunds (up to $20 per monthly cycle), and mortgage refinancing services. Customers can access online banking, mobile apps for check deposits, and debit card services. The bank advertises competitive rates for refinancing and promotes its Kasasa® product line as a primary checking account option with rewards structures tied to debit card usage and direct deposits. Concordia Bank distinguishes itself through multi-branch accessibility across Missouri, Saturday banking hours at some locations, and specific Kasasa® account qualifications (requiring 10 debit card transactions and one direct deposit per cycle with a $100 minimum opening balance). The bank emphasizes cybersecurity with "STOP. THINK. CONNECT™" messaging and maintains a privacy policy complying with federal consumer protection standards. The routing number is 101917843. As a community bank, Concordia Bank offers limited product diversity compared to large national banks—the website does not advertise business loans, investment services, credit cards, or comprehensive lending products beyond mortgages. The bank explicitly states it has no affiliates and does not engage in affiliate marketing or non-affiliate marketing sharing. Customers seeking extensive financial services beyond basic checking, savings, and mortgage refinancing would need to supplement with other providers.
services: Kasasa® Cash Back checking (2% cash back up to $6/month)
Kasasa® checking with ATM fee refunds
Mobile banking app with mobile deposit functionality
ATM fee refunds (up to $20 per monthly cycle)
Direct deposit and bill pay services
In-person teller services at 4 branch locations
pros: Kasasa® Cash Back checking earns 2% cash back (up to $6/month) with straightforward qualification requirements
ATM fee refunds up to $20 per monthly cycle nationwide
Mobile deposit capability available through Concordia Bank mobile app
Multiple branch locations in Missouri (Concordia, Odessa, Laurie) with drive-through facilities
Saturday banking hours available at Odessa and Laurie branches (9am-12pm)
No minimum balance requirement after account opening for Kasasa® Cash Back
Strong privacy protection stance with explicit statement against affiliate and non-affiliate marketing sharing
cons: Limited to 4 physical branch locations across Missouri—not suitable for customers needing broader geographic access
No advertised credit card products, business banking, or investment services
Kasasa® qualification requirements (10 debit transactions + 1 direct deposit monthly) may be difficult for some consumers to meet consistently
Limited Saturday hours (9am-12pm only) and no Sunday banking at any location
Website does not detail savings account rates, CD rates, or comprehensive loan product offerings
best_for: Central Missouri residents in Concordia, Odessa, or Laurie seeking community banking with personal relationships
Customers who make frequent debit purchases and have regular direct deposits (to maximize Kasasa® benefits)
Homeowners considering mortgage refinancing in Missouri with preference for local lender consultation
diagnosis: Concordia Bank is best for customers in central Missouri seeking community-based banking with modern digital tools and personalized service. Primary caveat: this is a small regional bank with only 4 locations, making it suitable only for those in its service areas; customers needing comprehensive financial services (business loans, investments, credit cards) or those in other states should look elsewhere.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community bank in Missouri offering checking, savings, mobile banking, and refinancing services with personalized customer service.
